meaning: n.带兜帽的夹克,带风帽的粗呢大衣
examples: I had a vision of myself in a fluffy anorak, looking like the Michelin Man.
His mother quilted a cotton-padded anorak for him.
Computer games are the ultimate anorak pursuit.
They paused in their walk while the anorak was unknotted and put on and zipped.
The hoo-hah in the tabloids over his wearing a green anorak at the wedding was certainly overblown.
